summary: Applied a minimal seam polish to improve chapter entry/exit continuity while preserving all core beats, voice, and causality.
edits: Reworked the opening into an action-first, time-anchored entry ('That evening...') to differentiate scaffold from the adjacent chapter opening while retaining storm and pain information.
Tightened late-scene reference to Tom's presence ('had to be Tom, back at last') to smooth handoff into Chapter 6 where he is present in-house.
